name: product-blueprint
description: Guided product-planning workflow from idea and research through concept, brand direction, PRD, cross-functional review, product definition, screen and service flows, and a design brief, with visual production available as a separate opt-in workflow.

interface.shortDescription: Turn an idea into a cross-reviewed PRD, complete product flows, and a clear design handoff brief.
interface.longDescription: Product Blueprint guides research, product concept comparison, positioning and brand direction, PRD creation, six-lens planning review, explicit user confirmation, product definition, screen and service contracts, feasibility, low-fidelity flows, and a concise design brief. The default workflow stops before visual UI production. A separate opt-in design-production workflow compares visual directions, earns approval on one representative screen, and only then expands to a design system, complete screens, prototype, and handoff. Technical architecture and API/DB wiring remain later explicit work.
defaultPrompt: Guide me from idea to a cross-reviewed product plan: compare concepts, establish a brand direction, write and review the PRD, confirm the first-version scope and product definition, map screens and flows, and finish with a design handoff brief. Stop before visual UI production unless I explicitly ask to continue with design-production.
